title: USEC_PASSCHNG
text: USEC_PASSCHNG Change the password for a given user. Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Password change successful, no info returned USEC_INFO Change successful, info returned in Error members USEC_ERROR Password change failed, error returned in Error members Description Change the password for a given user. The username is a null terminated string in Username . The existing password is a null-terminated string in Passwd . The new password is a null-terminated string in NewPasswd .
